description: Re-run planning on an existing task. Runs PLANNING, PLAN_REVIEW, and PLAN_AUDIT phases.

plan.md.description: Implementation plan with technical approach, module breakdown, data flow, error handling, test strategy

execution-graph.json.description: Execution graph with segments declaring id, executor, description, files_expected, depends_on, parallelizable, criteria_ids

audit-reports/plan-audit-*.json.description: Spec coverage audit report verifying plan covers all acceptance criteria

execution-log.md.description: Appended log entries for PLANNING, PLAN_REVIEW, PLAN_AUDIT stages
